item.title: Morning Brief - Monday, June 1, 2026
item.description: Near Drift Zone alert on the delta neutral side — the delta balance is outside tolerance at two hundred dollars with Eth sitting just thirty-nine dollars above the Drift Lower boundary, while all six equity positions hold in range with C-R-C-L-x leading at over fifty percent annualized.

item.title: Morning Brief - Saturday, May 30, 2026
item.description: Delta neutral cycle sits comfortably in Normal Zone though delta balance is nearly at its tolerance ceiling, while the equity side shows a blended fee rate of thirty-eight percent with all six positions in range.

item.title: Morning Brief - Friday, May 29, 2026
item.description: The delta neutral cycle sits in Normal Zone but Eth is only about thirty dollars above the Near Drift boundary, while all six equity positions are in range and earning fees with a blended rate around twenty-four percent annualized.

item.title: Morning Brief - Wednesday, May 27, 2026
item.description: Daily portfolio and market intelligence brief.

item.title: Morning Brief - Tuesday, May 26, 2026
item.description: Cycle nine closed on May twenty-third after Eth broke below Drift Lower for five consecutive candles, and no new cycle has been opened yet — the strategy is sitting in cash waiting for re-entry.

item.title: Morning Brief - Monday, May 25, 2026
item.description: Cycle nine closed two days ago after Eth broke below Drift Lower, and the strategy is currently between cycles with total fees of eleven hundred and seventy-three dollars over forty-one days — a strong run at around thirty-four percent annualized, now waiting for reentry conditions near two thousand one hundred dollars.

item.title: Morning Brief - Sunday, May 24, 2026
item.description: Cycle nine closed yesterday after Eth broke below the Drift Lower boundary, locking in eleven hundred and seventy-four dollars in fees over forty-one days — no new cycle is open yet and the strategy is currently sitting in cash.

item.title: Morning Brief - Saturday, May 23, 2026
item.description: Cycle nine closed today after Eth broke below Drift Lower for five consecutive four-hour candles, leaving the portfolio flat with no active position and a net fee yield of thirty-four percent annualized over forty-one days.

item.title: Morning Brief - Friday, May 22, 2026
item.description: Delta neutral cycle nine enters day forty in Near Drift Zone with Eth sitting just below the lower Near Drift boundary and delta outside tolerance — a hedge adjustment may be warranted today.

item.title: Morning Brief - Thursday, May 21, 2026
item.description: Cycle nine sits in Near Drift Zone on the lower side with delta outside tolerance and Eth trading just thirty-nine dollars above the Drift lower boundary.

item.title: Morning Brief - Wednesday, May 20, 2026
item.description: Eth is holding in Near Drift lower zone just thirty-five dollars above the Drift boundary, with delta outside tolerance and multiple hedge adjustments in recent days — worth a close eye this morning.

item.title: Morning Brief - Tuesday, May 19, 2026
item.description: Delta neutral strategy is in Near Drift Zone on the lower side with Eth just twenty-nine dollars above the Drift boundary and delta balance well outside tolerance at over four hundred dollars.

item.title: Morning Brief - Monday, May 18, 2026
item.description: Delta neutral cycle is thirty-six days in with the LP outside tolerance as Eth sits just one dollar above the Near Drift Lower boundary following an overnight hedge adjustment.

item.title: Morning Brief - Sunday, May 17, 2026
item.description: Delta neutral cycle at day thirty-five sits in Normal Zone with fees crossing one thousand dollars, though Eth is drifting close to the lower Near Drift boundary and worth monitoring today.

item.title: Morning Brief - Saturday, May 16, 2026
item.description: The delta neutral strategy sits thirty-four days into cycle nine with Eth approaching the lower end of Normal Zone, just fifty dollars above the Near Drift boundary — worth watching closely today.

item.title: Morning Brief - Friday, May 15, 2026
item.description: Delta neutral cycle thirty-three sits comfortably in Normal Zone with net price delta nearly flat at negative seventeen dollars and total fees approaching one thousand dollars.

item.title: Morning Brief - Thursday, May 14, 2026
item.description: Delta neutral cycle nine is thirty-two days in with the net price delta almost perfectly balanced at just five dollars, fees near one thousand dollars, and Eth sitting comfortably in Normal Zone with sixty-nine dollars of room to spare.

item.title: Morning Brief - Wednesday, May 13, 2026
item.description: The delta neutral strategy cycle is thirty-one days in with near-perfect price balance — net price delta of under two dollars — though Eth sits just sixty-three dollars below the Near Drift upper boundary and may warrant monitoring through the day.

item.title: Morning Brief - Tuesday, May 12, 2026
item.description: Eth is sitting just eighteen dollars below Near Drift Upper at two thousand three hundred and eight dollars, making band proximity the key watch item for today's cycle thirty day mark.

item.title: Morning Brief - Monday, May 11, 2026
item.description: Delta neutral cycle sits in Near Drift Zone with Eth pressing right against the upper Near Drift boundary and delta just outside tolerance — worth monitoring for a hedge adjustment today.

item.title: Morning Brief - Sunday, May 10, 2026
item.description: Eth is sitting right at the Near Drift upper boundary on day twenty-eight of the cycle, with delta just outside tolerance and only forty-three dollars of room to the Drift line.

item.title: Morning Brief - Saturday, May 9, 2026
item.description: The delta neutral strategy cycle sits in Normal Zone but Eth is just twelve dollars below the Near Drift upper boundary, putting the position one small move away from a zone change.

item.title: Morning Brief - Friday, May 8, 2026
item.description: Delta neutral cycle sits comfortably in Normal Zone on day twenty-five, with net price delta nearly flat at under five dollars and total fees approaching eight hundred and forty dollars for the cycle.

item.title: Morning Brief - Thursday, May 7, 2026
item.description: Eth has drifted into Near Drift Zone and sits just thirty-three dollars below the Drift Upper boundary, with delta currently within tolerance but worth watching closely today.

item.title: Morning Brief - Wednesday, May 6, 2026
item.description: Delta neutral cycle is twenty-four days in with Eth pressing into Near Drift Zone just six dollars from the Drift boundary, and delta outside tolerance — a hedge adjustment may be needed today.

item.title: Morning Brief - Tuesday, May 5, 2026
item.description: Eth has crossed above the Drift Upper boundary into Drift Zone at two thousand three hundred and seventy-nine dollars, with delta outside tolerance at two hundred and fifty-two dollars — hedge review is likely needed today.

item.title: Morning Brief - Monday, May 4, 2026
item.description: The strategy enters day twenty-two of cycle nine in Near Drift Zone with Eth just fifteen dollars below the drift boundary and delta balance outside tolerance at one hundred and thirty-four dollars versus a sixty-four dollar threshold — a hedge adjustment may be warranted today.

item.title: Morning Brief - Sunday, May 3, 2026
item.description: The delta neutral strategy cycle enters day twenty-one with Eth sitting just eleven dollars below Near Drift Upper and the hedge slightly outside balance, though delta remains within Normal Zone tolerance.

item.title: Morning Brief - Saturday, May 2, 2026
item.description: Eth is just nineteen dollars below the Near Drift Upper boundary at two thousand three hundred and seven dollars, making zone monitoring the top priority for the day despite the cycle sitting well within delta tolerance.

item.title: Morning Brief - Friday, May 1, 2026
item.description: Delta neutral cycle nine sits nineteen days in with Eth in Normal Zone, delta comfortably within tolerance, and fees approaching six hundred and sixty-five dollars at about thirty-four dollars a day.
